sql.if: and ( (COALESCE(a.bill_type, 1) != 3 and a.department_id in ()) or (COALESCE(a.bill_type, 1) = 3 and a.warehouse_id in () and a.department_id in ()) )

mapper.sql: select a.id, a.apply_bill_no, a.apply_bill_date, a.warehouse_id, a.department_id, a.user_id, a.apply_bill_status, a.del_flag, a.tenant_id, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, a.reject_reason, COALESCE(a.bill_type, 1) as bill_type, w.id wId, w.code warehouseCode, w.name warehouseName, dept_out.id as out_dId, dept_out.code as out_departmentCode, dept_out.name as out_departmentName, a.audit_by, a.audit_date, u.user_id userId,u.nick_name nickName,u.user_name userName,d.id dId,d.code departmentCode,d.name departmentName, cu.nick_name createNickName,cu.user_name createUserName, au.nick_name auditNickName,au.user_name auditUserName, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(cu.nick_name), ''), cu.user_name) AS creater_display_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(au.nick_name), ''), au.user_name) AS audit_display_name, COALESCE((select SUM(IFNULL(entry.amt, 0)) from bas_apply_entry entry where entry.paren_id = a.id and (entry.del_flag is null or entry.del_flag != 1)), 0) as total_amount from bas_apply a left join fd_warehouse w on (COALESCE(a.bill_type, 1) != 3) and a.warehouse_id = w.id left join fd_department dept_out on COALESCE(a.bill_type, 1) = 3 and a.warehouse_id = dept_out.id left join sys_user u on a.user_id = u.user_id left join fd_department d on a.department_id = d.id left join sys_user cu on a.create_by = cu.user_id left join sys_user au on a.audit_by = au.user_id
mapper.select: select a.id, a.apply_bill_no, a.apply_bill_date, a.warehouse_id, a.department_id, a.user_id, a.apply_bill_status, a.del_flag, a.tenant_id, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, a.reject_reason, COALESCE(a.bill_type, 1) as bill_type, a.audit_date, dept_out.id as out_dId, dept_out.code as out_departmentCode, dept_out.name as out_departmentName, wh.id wId, wh.code warehouseCode, wh.name warehouseName, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(cu.nick_name), ''), cu.user_name) AS creater_display_name, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(au.nick_name), ''), au.user_name) AS audit_display_name, b.id as sub_id, b.paren_id as sub_paren_id, b.material_id as sub_material_id, b.stock_warehouse_id as sub_stock_warehouse_id, b.unit_price as sub_unit_price, b.qty as sub_qty, b.price as sub_price, b.amt as sub_amt, b.batch_no as sub_batch_no, b.batch_numer as sub_batch_numer, b.remark as sub_remark, b.begin_time as sub_begin_time, b.end_time as sub_end_time, b.tenant_id as sub_tenant_id, sw.id sw_id, sw.code sw_code, sw.name sw_name, d.id as dId, d.code as departmentCode, d.name as departmentName, au.nick_name auditNickName,au.user_name auditUserName, cu.nick_name createNickName,cu.user_name createUserName,a.audit_by,m.code materialCode,m.name materialName, case when whagg.bas_apply_entry_id is null then b.qty else coalesce(whagg.sum_pending_out, b.qty) end as sub_pending_outbound_qty, coalesce(whagg.sum_pending_audit_qty, 0) as sub_ck_pending_audit_qty, coalesce(whagg.sum_linked_qty, 0) as sub_linked_ck_qty, coalesce(whagg.sum_audited_qty, 0) as sub_ck_audited_qty, coalesce(whagg.sum_void_qty, 0) as sub_wh_line_void_qty, (case when b.stock_warehouse_id is null then null else (select coalesce(sum(inv.qty), 0) from stk_inventory inv where inv.material_id = b.material_id and inv.warehouse_id = b.stock_warehouse_id and inv.tenant_id = b.tenant_id and (inv.del_flag = 0 or inv.del_flag is null) and ifnull(inv.qty, 0) > 0) end) as sub_available_stock_qty from bas_apply a left join fd_department dept_out on COALESCE(a.bill_type, 1) = 3 and a.warehouse_id = dept_out.id left join fd_warehouse wh on (COALESCE(a.bill_type, 1) != 3) and a.warehouse_id = wh.id left join bas_apply_entry b on b.paren_id = a.id and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) left join fd_warehouse sw on b.stock_warehouse_id = sw.id left join fd_department d on a.department_id = d.id left join sys_user au on a.audit_by = au.user_id left join sys_user cu on a.create_by = cu.user_id left join fd_material m on b.material_id = m.id left join ( select e.bas_apply_entry_id, sum(coalesce(s.linked_qty, 0)) as sum_linked_qty, sum(coalesce(s.pending_audit_qty, 0)) as sum_pending_audit_qty, sum(coalesce(s.audited_qty, 0)) as sum_audited_qty, sum(coalesce(e.line_void_qty, 0)) as sum_void_qty, sum(e.qty - coalesce(e.line_void_qty, 0) - coalesce(s.linked_qty, 0)) as sum_pending_out from wh_warehouse_apply_entry e inner join wh_warehouse_apply w on w.id = e.paren_id and w.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (w.del_flag = 0 or w.del_flag is null) left join ( select r.wh_apply_entry_id wid, sum(case when r.del_flag = 0 and r.link_status = 1 and (b.id is null or (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null)) then r.ref_qty else 0 end) linked_qty, sum(case when r.del_flag = 0 and r.link_status = 1 and b.id is not null and (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null) and b.bill_status = 1 and b.bill_type = 201 then r.ref_qty else 0 end) pending_audit_qty, sum(case when r.del_flag = 0 and r.link_status = 1 and b.id is not null and (b.del_flag = 0 or b.del_flag is null) and b.bill_status = 2 and b.bill_type = 201 then r.ref_qty else 0 end) audited_qty from wh_wh_apply_ck_entry_ref r left join stk_io_bill b on b.id = cast(r.ck_bill_id as unsigned) and b.tenant_id = r.tenant_id where r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} group by r.wh_apply_entry_id ) s on s.wid = e.id where e.bas_apply_id = cast(#{id} as char) and e.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) group by e.bas_apply_entry_id ) whagg on whagg.bas_apply_entry_id = cast(b.id as char) where a.id = #{id} and a.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

select cast(e.bas_apply_entry_id as unsigned) as basApplyEntryId, wa.apply_bill_no as whApplyBillNo, trim(r.ck_bill_id) as ckBillId, b.bill_no as ckBillNo, b.bill_status as ckBillStatus, trim(r.ck_entry_id) as ckEntryId, r.ref_qty as refQty, ent.qty as ckEntryQty, m.name as materialName from wh_wh_apply_ck_entry_ref r inner join wh_warehouse_apply_entry e on e.id = r.wh_apply_entry_id and e.tenant_id = r.tenant_id inner join wh_warehouse_apply wa on wa.id = r.wh_apply_id and wa.tenant_id = r.tenant_id left join stk_io_bill b on b.id = cast(r.ck_bill_id as unsigned) and b.tenant_id = r.tenant_id left join stk_io_bill_entry ent on ent.id = cast(r.ck_entry_id as unsigned) and ent.tenant_id = r.tenant_id left join fd_material m on ent.material_id = m.id where e.bas_apply_id = cast(#{basApplyId} as char) and r.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and r.del_flag = 0 and r.link_status = 1 and (e.del_flag = 0 or e.del_flag is null) order by e.bas_apply_entry_id, b.bill_no, r.id
mapper.insert:
insert into bas_apply
apply_bill_no, apply_bill_date, warehouse_id, department_id, user_id, apply_bill_status, bill_type, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, audit_by, audit_date, reject_reason, tenant_id,
#{applyBillNo}, #{applyBillDate}, #{warehouseId}, #{departmentId}, #{userId}, #{applyBillStatus}, #{billType}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{auditBy}, #{auditDate}, #{rejectReason}, #{scopedTenantId},
mapper.delete: update bas_apply set del_flag = 1, del_by = #{deleteBy}, del_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}

update bas_apply set del_flag = 1, del_by = #{deleteBy}, del_time = now(), update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and id in
#{id}

update bas_apply_entry set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and paren_id in
#{id}
update bas_apply_entry set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where paren_id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
mapper.insert:
insert into bas_apply_entry( paren_id, material_id, stock_warehouse_id, unit_price, qty, price, amt, batch_no, batch_numer, remark, begin_time, end_time, tenant_id) values
(#{item.parenId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.stockWarehouseId}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.qty}, #{item.price}, #{item.amt}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.batchNumer}, #{item.remark}, #{item.beginTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.tenantId})
mapper.select: select max(apply_bill_no) from bas_apply where apply_bill_no like concat('%',#{date},'%') and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
